name: VidSrc Alternative for TMDB Movie & TV Embeds | VidCore API
snippet: Yes. VidCore is designed as a VidSrc alternative for developers who want TMDB embed URLs, HLS playback, subtitles, multi-server fallback, and player events.

name: Retrieve all existing subtitles for an item - Developer API - Emby
snippet: Using the API, i am trying retrieve all existing subtitles for an item (i.e not embedded subtitles, but .srt that have been downloaded).

name: Inside4ndroid/TMDB-Embed-API - GitHub
snippet: An api to get embed sources using tmdb id. Contribute to Inside4ndroid/TMDB-Embed-API development by creating an account on GitHub.
